method: git stash of S2's own modified files (contacts.tsx, directMessageNotifications.ts, i18n.ts, unreadStore.ts, and their test files) plus temporary removal of S2's new files, leaving S1's already-landed working-tree changes in place — S1 is described as already implemented and merged into the working tree per this story's task brief.

lint.note: next lint has no eslint config in this repo and prompts interactively to create one (Strict/Base/Cancel) — not a usable non-interactive command. Recorded NO_LINT per Step 0's NO_TESTS-style tolerance.
